download_pdf.description: Download the rendered PDF for a known public arXiv paper and return a local file receipt with an integrity digest.

errors.message: arXiv is asking clients to slow down before making another request.
errors.user_action: Wait at least ten seconds, then retry the same operation.

errors.message: The requested public arXiv service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing valid inputs.

errors.message: arXiv did not find a public PDF for that identifier.
errors.user_action: Check the identifier with get_papers and retry with a valid public record.

id.description: A modern or legacy arXiv identifier, optionally including a version suffix.

filename.description: Safe local filename assigned by AgentWeb.

path.description: Private local path where AgentWeb saved the file.

pagination.behavior: Each call downloads exactly one paper PDF.

download_pdf.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for metadata-only questions because get_papers is faster and smaller.
download_pdf.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs the complete paper contents or must pass the PDF to a document-processing tool.

download_source.description: Download the public source bundle for a known arXiv paper and return a local file receipt with an integrity digest.

errors.message: arXiv is asking clients to slow down before making another request.
errors.user_action: Wait at least ten seconds, then retry the same operation.

errors.message: The requested public arXiv service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing valid inputs.

errors.message: arXiv did not provide a public source bundle for that identifier.
errors.user_action: Download the PDF instead or verify the identifier with get_papers.

id.description: A modern or legacy arXiv identifier, optionally including a version suffix.

filename.description: Safe local filename assigned by AgentWeb.

path.description: Private local path where AgentWeb saved the file.

pagination.behavior: Each call downloads exactly one available source bundle.

download_source.when_not_to_use: Do not assume every paper exposes source, and do not use this when only the rendered PDF is needed.
download_source.when_to_use: Use this to inspect LaTeX, figures, ancillary files, or other submitter-provided source material.

get_bibtex.description: Retrieve arXiv's BibTeX citation text for a known public paper identifier.

errors.message: arXiv is asking clients to slow down before making another request.
errors.user_action: Wait at least ten seconds, then retry the same operation.

errors.message: The requested public arXiv service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing valid inputs.

id.description: A modern or legacy arXiv identifier, optionally including a version suffix.

pagination.behavior: Each call returns one citation record.

get_bibtex.when_not_to_use: Do not use this as authoritative published-journal metadata when the paper links to a later journal version.
get_bibtex.when_to_use: Use this when an agent needs a ready-to-save BibTeX entry for citation management or scholarly writing.

get_category_feed.description: Read and normalize the current public RSS announcements for an exact arXiv category.

errors.message: arXiv is asking clients to slow down before making another request.
errors.user_action: Wait at least ten seconds, then retry the same operation.

errors.message: The requested public arXiv service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing valid inputs.

category.description: Exact arXiv category identifier, such as cs.AI or quant-ph.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous category-feed page.

limit.description: Maximum announcements to return, from 1 through 50.

papers.description: Current announcements in the category feed.

pagination.behavior: The current bounded RSS announcement window is returned; older history is not paginated by the feed.

get_category_feed.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for historical or exhaustive category search; call list_category_papers instead.
get_category_feed.when_to_use: Use this for lightweight monitoring of newly announced papers in a known subject category.

get_papers.description: Retrieve normalized metadata for one or more exact arXiv identifiers, including version-specific records when requested.

errors.message: arXiv is asking clients to slow down before making another request.
errors.user_action: Wait at least ten seconds, then retry the same operation.

errors.message: The requested public arXiv service is temporarily unavailable.
errors.user_action: Wait briefly and retry the same operation without changing valid inputs.

ids.description: One to fifty comma-separated arXiv identifiers, optionally including version suffixes such as 1706.03762v7.

items_per_page.description: Number of papers requested for this page.

papers.description: Papers returned by arXiv in the requested order.

total_results.description: Total matching papers reported by arXiv.

pagination.behavior: This exact-identifier lookup accepts at most fifty identifiers in one bounded call.

get_papers.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for topical discovery or for downloading paper files.
get_papers.when_to_use: Use this when the agent already knows up to fifty comma-separated arXiv identifiers and needs titles, abstracts, authors, categories, links, or version timestamps.

list_author_papers.description: Find public arXiv papers credited to a named author and return the newest matching records with normalized metadata.

errors.message: arXiv is asking clients to slow down before making another request.

author.description: Author name to match, such as Yoshua Bengio.

limit.description: Number of papers to return, from 1 through 100.

items_per_page.description: Number of papers requested for this page.

papers.description: Papers returned by arXiv in the requested order.

total_results.description: Total matching papers reported by arXiv.

list_author_papers.when_not_to_use: Do not assume name matches uniquely identify one person; use returned titles, affiliations, and subjects to disambiguate.
list_author_papers.when_to_use: Use this when an agent has a human author name and wants that person's arXiv papers.

resources.description: Official bulk-data, terms, dataset, and harvesting resources.

categories.description: Archive and subject-category names with canonical arXiv URLs.

content.description: Readable page text with navigation markup and HTML syntax removed.

pagination.behavior: One official page is read per call; long text is bounded by AgentWeb's response budget.

read_site_resource.when_not_to_use: Do not use this for paper records, PDFs, source bundles, external websites, account pages, or submission workflows.

constraints: Site permissions, rate limits, and anti-automation rules still apply
human_boundaries: Account creation and sign-in require credentials that are outside this anonymous public benchmark matrix.
Endorsement and moderation require privileged accounts that are unavailable to this public benchmark.
Manuscript submission changes public scholarly records and requires a registered author plus human review.
coverage.website_parity: Mapping mode can inspect the remaining website while direct request recipes are compiled. Browser commands are never counted as runtime parity.
